description_long: This is a large, dark wood-finished desk with a modern, functional design featuring multiple storage and organizational elements. The desk includes a spacious main work surface with a curved cutout for ergonomic seating, three drawers on the left side, and a cabinet on the right for additional storage. Above the main surface, there are two elevated shelves and a closed cubby with a metallic handle, providing space for books, office supplies, or decorative items. The desk also features a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface, supported by metal runners. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of flat panels and vertical supports, and the finish is smooth with a subtle wood grain texture. This desk is suitable for use in professional or home office environments where ample workspace and storage are required.
description: A large, dark wood-finished desk with multiple drawers, shelves, a closed cubby, and a pull-out keyboard tray. It features a spacious work surface and modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, three drawers on the left, a cabinet on the right, and upper shelving with a closed cubby.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the vertical supports, and the layered shelving above the main surface.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the curved cutout of the work surface, the arrangement of drawers, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the profile of the upper shelving and cubby.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the curved cutout in the main work surface, drawers on the left, a cabinet on the right, and upper shelving with a closed cubby above; this is the intended front for user interaction.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or office desk for multitasking and storage
